AI in Medical Regulation

2026 Outlook

Good morning everyone. [pause] Today I want to walk through where AI stands.

Three forces converging

  • Generative models in clinical workflows
  • Board complaint volume up 40%
  • State-level AI regulation fragmenting
Key stat: 40% uptick. Mention California comparison.
"The practice of medicine is changing faster than at any point in our lifetimes."
This quote sums it up.

Thank You
